action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_stability_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current hydrostatic stability metrics of the ship, specifically the Metacentric Height (GM) and the Vertical Center of Gravity (KG).

action_set_definitions.name: scan_pier_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all cargo units currently on the pier, including their unique IDs, categories, and weights in tons.

action_set_definitions.name: get_bay_loading_status
action_set_definitions.description: Provides the current weight distribution of the ship's bays. Each bay has a strict total weight capacity limit of 200.0 tons.

action_set_definitions.name: load_cargo_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Loads a specific cargo unit into a targeted bay and tier. This increases the total weight of the bay and shifts the vessel's center of gravity.

unit_id.description: The ID of the unit to load.

tier_level.description: The vertical tier level (e.g., 8, 10, 12 for high-tier positions).

action_set_definitions.name: unload_cargo_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Removes a cargo unit from a specific bay and tier. This is used to free up weight capacity in a bay if the 200.0 ton limit would be exceeded by new cargo.

bay_id.description: The bay ID from which to unload.

tier_level.description: The tier level of the unit to be removed.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_ballast_system
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the liquid ballast in the ship's tanks to fine-tune the GM when cargo placement alone is insufficient. 'top_tanks' reduces GM; 'bottom_tanks' increases GM.

operation.description: Action to perform on the tanks.

amount_m3.description: Volume of ballast water to move.

state_description.ship_metadata: General ship information and global constraints.
state_description.hydrostatics: Current physical balance of the ship.
state_description.bays: List of cargo bays and their current occupancy.
state_description.dock_inventory: Containers currently on the pier waiting to be loaded.
